summary: Comprehensive testing of Live Dashboard critical fixes. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - all features working correctly including date handling, live counters, status badges, and compact kit cards.

issues: Console warning: button nested inside button - not affecting functionality but should be fixed for HTML compliance

critical_code_review_comments: calculate_live_duration_hours() function correctly calculates running hours for active/paused records
Live Dashboard queries shifts by deployment_id (from deployments table) instead of date field - avoids timezone mismatch issue
Total hours, morning_hours, night_hours, category_hours all include live hours from active records
Pause logic correctly excludes paused time from duration calculation
Resume logic correctly continues from pause point
Stop logic correctly calculates: final_duration = end_time - start_time - total_paused_duration
Kit cards are compact (2-4 per row) with minimal spacing
Status badges show correct colors: Active (green), Paused (amber), Idle (grey)
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created temporary collection records for testing Pause/Resume/Stop flow - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Dashboard fixes verified: 1) Queries by deployment_id to avoid timezone issues with date field, 2) Total hours include both completed AND active records, 3) Category hours include active records, 4) Morning/Night shift hours include active records, 5) Pause/Resume/Stop logic working correctly - paused time not counted in active duration, 6) Kit cards compact with 2-4 per row, 7) Status badges: Active (green), Paused (amber), Idle (grey). Existing deployment ID for testing: dep-202603200850005125

features_verified: Date handling - Live Dashboard queries by deployment_id not date field
Live counters - Total hours includes BOTH completed AND active records
Live counters - Morning/Night shift hours include active records
Live counters - Category hours include active records
Pause logic - Paused time does NOT count as active time
Resume logic - Resume correctly continues from pause point
Stop logic - Final duration = end_time - start_time - total_paused_duration
Kit card UI - Compact design with minimal spacing (2-4 per row)
Real-time timer - Frontend updates every second (timer interval)
Status badges - Idle (grey) shown for kits without active collection
